title: Jesus Christ: The Eternally Reigning God
tags: _[25]_;_[30]_;_[31]_;31]_  _Because you:_ + O King Messiah. (_Targum Psalms:**An English Translation**_ , **by Edward M. Cook,** 2002, Book 2 – [ _Psalms 42-72_;_ḥakhlili_] from wine” – from here you learn that wine is abundant in his domain, like a person who says to another: ‘Pour for me, and again, as my palate is sweet to me, a sweet palate for me, for me [_ḥeikh li li_].’ “And his teeth white from milk” – due to the merit of the Torah, “if your sins will be like scarlet, they will be whitened as snow” (Isaiah 1:18). ([**_Bereshit Rabbah 99:8_**;** _PSALM 45: THE FATHER’S PRAISE OF HIS DIVINE SON_**
